tags.name: Heartbeat
tags.description: Public ping endpoint for heartbeat monitors

tags.name: Integrations
tags.description: Static catalog of supported alert channel integrations

tags.name: Incident Policies
tags.description: Manage trigger, confirmation, and recovery rules for monitors

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Webhook endpoint management, event catalog, and delivery history

tags.name: Alert Channels
tags.description: Alert channel CRUD and connectivity testing

tags.name: Service Subscriptions
tags.description: Manage which services an organization tracks

tags.name: Status Data
tags.description: Public service status catalog, components, uptime, and incident history

tags.name: Check Results
tags.description: Query raw check results, uptime statistics, and summary data

tags.name: Monitor Auth
tags.description: Manage authentication configuration for a monitor

tags.name: Monitor Alert Channels
tags.description: Manage alert channel mappings for a monitor

tags.name: Alert Deliveries
tags.description: Delivery audit trail: inspect per-attempt details for alert deliveries

tags.name: API Auth
tags.description: Identity and quota info for API key authentication

tags.name: Resource Groups
tags.description: Resource group CRUD and member management

tags.name: Notification Policies
tags.description: Org-level notification routing policies with JSONB match rules

tags.name: Notification Dispatches
tags.description: Dispatch debugging API: inspect which policies matched an incident and track delivery status

get.summary: Get current user
Get current user's notification preferences
Get workspace by ID
Get a single webhook endpoint

put.summary: Update a tag's name and/or color

delete.summary: Delete a tag (cascades to all monitor associations)

get.summary: Get a resource group by id with member statuses and inherited settings
get.description: Pass includeMetrics=true to enrich each member with 24h uptime, chart data, and latency metrics.

put.summary: Update a resource group's name, description, alert policy, inherited settings, and health threshold

delete.summary: Delete a resource group (cascades to member rows)

get.summary: Get the current organization
Get a notification policy by ID
Get incident policy for a monitor
get.description: Returns the trigger rules, confirmation settings, and recovery settings for the given monitor.

put.summary: Update incident policy for a monitor
put.description: Replaces the trigger rules, confirmation settings, and recovery settings. All fields are validated before saving.

put.summary: Update authentication config for a monitor

post.summary: Set authentication config for a monitor

delete.summary: Remove authentication config from a monitor

put.summary: Update an assertion on a monitor

delete.summary: Remove an assertion from a monitor

put.summary: Replace the linked alert channel set for a monitor

get.summary: Get a single monitor by id
Get a single maintenance window by ID
Get environment by slug

put.summary: Update an alert channel's name and re-encrypt config

delete.summary: Soft-delete an alert channel and return affected policy summary

get.summary: List transactions

post.summary: Create a monitor with smart defaults from URL analysis
Complete onboarding setup (creates org + workspace, advances to FIRST_MONITOR)
Analyze a URL and return suggested monitor configuration

get.summary: List workspaces
List webhook endpoints for the authenticated org

post.summary: Send a test delivery to a webhook endpoint
Generate or rotate the organization webhook signing secret

post.description: Generates a new Data Encryption Key, re-encrypts all secrets and alert-channel configs, and bumps the vault version. Admin-only. Pipeline DEK caches expire within ~10 minutes.

get.summary: List tags for the authenticated organization

post.summary: Subscribe to a service or a component of a service
post.description: Idempotent — returns the existing subscription if an identical one exists. Omit the request body or set componentId to null for a whole-service subscription. Free tier: max 10 subscriptions. Paid tier: unlimited.

get.summary: List secrets
List all resource groups for the authenticated org with health summaries

post.summary: Add a monitor or service member to a resource group

get.summary: List all notification policies for the authenticated org

post.summary: Create a notification policy with match rules and escalation chain
Dry-run: evaluate a policy's match rules against a supplied incident context

post.description: Marks the dispatch as acknowledged. The dispatch must be in DELIVERED or ESCALATING state. Sets acknowledgedAt, acknowledgedBy (actor email), and acknowledgedVia (DASHBOARD).

get.summary: List monitors for the authenticated org

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Filter by tag names, comma-separated (e.g. prod,critical)

post.summary: Add an assertion to a monitor

post.description: Runs the saved config and assertions of an existing monitor once, without persisting any result. Runs synchronously and returns the same shape as the ad-hoc test.

get.summary: Get all tags applied to a monitor

post.summary: Add tags to a monitor; supports existing tag IDs and inline creation of new tags

delete.summary: Remove tags from a monitor by their IDs

post.summary: Rotate the ping token for a heartbeat monitor
post.description: Generates a new ping token. The old token remains valid for 24 hours to allow cron jobs to be updated without downtime. Only supported for HEARTBEAT monitors.
Executes a one-off check from an inline config without saving the monitor. Runs synchronously and returns status code, response time, assertion results, body preview, and headers.
Applies PAUSE, RESUME, DELETE, ADD_TAG, or REMOVE_TAG to a list of monitors. Returns a partial-success response indicating which monitors succeeded and which failed.

get.summary: List maintenance windows for the authenticated org
get.description: Returns maintenance windows for the caller's organisation. Optionally filter by monitor_id, and/or by status: 'active' (currently in window) or 'upcoming' (starts in the future).

post.description: Creates a new maintenance window. Set monitorId to null to create an org-wide window that suppresses alerts for all monitors.

get.summary: List invites
List incidents for the authenticated org

post.summary: Add an update to an incident (optionally change status)

get.summary: Record a heartbeat ping (GET)
get.description: Called by external systems (cron jobs, scheduled tasks) to signal liveness. Always returns 200 OK.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Ping endpoint token for the heartbeat monitor

post.description: Called by external systems to signal liveness with an optional JSON payload. The payload can be inspected by heartbeat_payload_contains assertions. Always returns 200 OK.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Ping endpoint token for the heartbeat monitor

get.summary: List environments
List API keys

post.description: Resets a FAILED delivery to RETRY_PENDING so the delivery worker re-attempts it.

get.summary: List active alert channels for the authenticated org

post.summary: Create a new alert channel with encrypted config
Test a saved alert channel's connectivity
Test alert channel connectivity using raw config (no saved channel required)

patch.summary: Update alert sensitivity for a subscription
patch.description: Controls which external incidents trigger alerts: ALL (any status change), INCIDENTS_ONLY (real vendor incidents, default), MAJOR_ONLY (only DOWN-level incidents).

get.summary: List public billing plans
List active subscriptions
Get upcoming charge
Get subscription management URLs
Get customer auth token
Get resolved entitlements and current usage for the organization
Search organizations
Get current user's organizations
Subscribe to real-time platform events via SSE
List recent deliveries for a webhook endpoint
Get signing secret metadata for the authenticated org
List all available webhook event types
get.description: Returns the full catalog of supported outbound webhook event types with their surface grouping and human-readable descriptions. Use this to populate subscription checkboxes when creating or updating a webhook endpoint.

get.summary: List all enabled services (cursor-paginated)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor from a previous response

get.summary: Get a single service by slug or UUID with current status, components, and recent incidents
Get uptime statistics for a service
get.description: Uptime data aggregated across active non-group components.

get.summary: List scheduled maintenances for a service

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (e.g. scheduled, in_progress, verifying, completed)

get.summary: List incident history for a service (paginated)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter: active (unresolved), resolved, or omit for all

get.summary: Get incident detail with full update timeline
List active components for a service with current status and inline uptime
Get daily uptime data for a component
Global status summary across all services
get.description: Returns aggregate counts of services by status and a list of services currently experiencing issues.

get.summary: List vendor incidents across all services (paginated)
get.description: Cross-service vendor incident feed ordered by start date descending.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter: active (unresolved), resolved, or omit for all

get.summary: List all service subscriptions for the organization
Get a subscription by its ID

delete.summary: Remove a subscription by its ID
delete.description: Removes a specific subscription (whole-service or component-level). No-op if not found.

get.summary: Get the detailed health breakdown for a resource group
get.description: Returns member counts, worst-of status, and threshold-based health evaluation. The thresholdStatus field is populated only when a health threshold is configured.

get.summary: List notifications for the current user
Get unread notification count
List all dispatches (firing history) for a notification policy
List all dispatches for an incident
get.description: Returns all notification dispatches for the given incident that belong to the authenticated org's policies. Each dispatch includes delivery records for all associated channels.

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: UUID of the incident to inspect

get.summary: Get a single dispatch with full escalation and delivery history
get.description: Returns the dispatch state including current escalation step, acknowledgment info, and all delivery attempts made across every step.

get.summary: List version history for a monitor
get.description: Returns a paginated list of mutation snapshots for the monitor, newest first. Each version captures the full monitor config at the time of a PUT /monitors/{id} call.

get.summary: Get a specific version snapshot for a monitor
get.description: Returns the full monitor config snapshot captured at the given version number.

get.summary: Get uptime statistics
get.description: Returns uptime percentage and latency statistics for the requested time window, computed from continuous aggregates. Uses hourly aggregates for 24h/7d windows and daily aggregates for 30d/90d windows.

403.description: Monitor does not belong to the caller's org

get.summary: List raw check results
get.description: Returns check results for the given monitor with optional time-range, region, and pass/fail filtering. Uses cursor-based pagination — pass the returned `cursor` value on subsequent requests to retrieve the next page. The cursor encodes the original time bounds, so `from`/`to` are ignored when a cursor is present.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of time range (ISO 8601, inclusive); defaults to 24 hours ago

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of time range (ISO 8601, inclusive); defaults to now

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor from a previous response for pagination

403.description: Monitor does not belong to the caller's org

get.summary: Get results summary
get.description: Returns a dashboard summary for the monitor: current status derived from the latest result per region, time-bucketed chart data, the 24-hour uptime percentage, and the selected window's uptime percentage.

parameters.name: chartWindow
parameters.description: Chart window: 24h returns hourly buckets, 7d/30d/90d return daily buckets

403.description: Monitor does not belong to the caller's org

get.summary: List organization members
List all supported integration types
get.description: Returns the full static catalog of supported alert channel integration types with their metadata and config field schemas. Used by the frontend to dynamically render the 'Add Alert Channel' form.

get.summary: Get incident details including update timeline
Dashboard overview
get.description: Returns monitor status counts, average uptime windows, and incident aggregates for the authenticated org. Results are cached for 1 minute.

get.summary: List categories with service counts
Get current API key identity
get.description: Returns the authenticated API key's metadata, organization, billing plan, entitlements with usage, and current rate-limit quota. Only available for API key authentication (Bearer dh_live_...).

get.summary: List audit events for the current organization
List delivery attempts for a specific alert delivery
get.description: Returns the ordered list of delivery attempts (request/response audit data) for the given delivery ID.

get.summary: List delivery history for an alert channel

delete.summary: Remove a member from a resource group

items.description: Default regions for member monitors; null clears

items.description: Default alert channel IDs for member monitors; null clears

healthThresholdType.description: Health threshold type: COUNT or PERCENTAGE; null disables threshold

healthThresholdValue.description: Health threshold value; null disables threshold

suppressMemberAlerts.description: Suppress member-level alert notifications; null preserves current value

confirmationDelaySeconds.description: Confirmation delay in seconds; null clears

recoveryCooldownMinutes.description: Recovery cooldown in minutes; null clears

alertPolicyId.description: Notification policy applied to this group

defaultFrequency.description: Default check frequency in seconds for member monitors

confirmationDelaySeconds.description: Seconds to wait after health threshold breach before creating group incident

recoveryCooldownMinutes.description: Cooldown minutes after group incident resolves before a new one can open

members.description: Member list with individual statuses; populated on detail GET only

ResourceGroupDto.description: Resource group with health summary and optional member details

status.description: Worst-of health status across all members

totalMembers.description: Total number of members in the group

operationalCount.description: Number of members currently in operational status

failingCount.description: Number of failing members at time of last evaluation

ResourceGroupHealthDto.description: Aggregated health summary for a resource group

monitorId.description: Monitor ID; set when memberType is 'monitor'

serviceId.description: Service ID; set when memberType is 'service'

name.description: Display name of the referenced monitor or service

slug.description: Slug identifier for the service (services only); used for icons and uptime API calls

status.description: Computed health status for this member

effectiveFrequency.description: Effective check frequency label showing the group default when the monitor inherits it; null for services or when no group default is configured

chartData.description: Uptime tick values (0-100) for last-24h mini chart; populated when includeMetrics=true

items.description: Uptime tick values (0-100) for last-24h mini chart; populated when includeMetrics=true

avgLatencyMs.description: Average latency in ms (monitors only); populated when includeMetrics=true

lastCheckedAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent health check; populated when includeMetrics=true

monitorType.description: Monitor type (HTTP, DNS, TCP, ICMP, HEARTBEAT, MCP); monitors only

steps.description: Ordered escalation steps, evaluated in sequence

items.description: Alert channel IDs to notify in this step

resourceGroupIds.description: Resource group UUIDs the entity belongs to, for resource_group_id_in rules

items.description: Resource group UUIDs the entity belongs to, for resource_group_id_in rules

TestNotificationPolicyRequest.description: Event context for a dry-run match evaluation against a notification policy

matched.description: Whether the policy would match the supplied incident context

items.description: Rules that passed evaluation

unmatchedRules.description: Rules that did not pass evaluation

items.description: Rules that did not pass evaluation

TestMatchResult.description: Result of a dry-run match evaluation against a notification policy

dispatchId.description: Notification dispatch that created this delivery

channelType.description: Alert channel type (e.g. slack, email, webhook)

eventType.description: Incident lifecycle event that triggered this delivery

stepNumber.description: 1-based escalation step this delivery belongs to

fireCount.description: Fire sequence within the step: 1 = initial, 2+ = repeat re-fires

lastAttemptAt.description: When the last attempt was made

nextRetryAt.description: When the next retry is scheduled (null if not retrying)

deliveredAt.description: Timestamp when the delivery was confirmed (null if not yet delivered)

errorMessage.description: Error message from the last failed attempt

AlertDeliveryDto.description: Delivery record for a single channel within a notification dispatch

policyName.description: Human-readable name of the matched policy (null if policy has been deleted)

completionReason.description: Why the dispatch reached COMPLETED: EXHAUSTED (all steps ran, no ack), RESOLVED (incident resolved), NO_STEPS (policy had no steps). Null for non-terminal states.

currentStep.description: 1-based index of the currently active escalation step

totalSteps.description: Total number of escalation steps in the policy (null if policy has been deleted)

acknowledgedAt.description: Timestamp when this dispatch was acknowledged (null if not acknowledged)

nextEscalationAt.description: Timestamp when the next escalation step will fire (null if not scheduled)

lastNotifiedAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent notification delivery

deliveries.description: Delivery records for all channels associated with this dispatch

surface.description: Product surface this event belongs to, e.g. "monitoring" or "status_data"

description.description: Human-readable description of when this event fires

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when there are no more results

hasMore.description: Whether more results exist beyond this page

CursorPageServiceCatalogDto.description: Cursor-paginated response for time-series and append-only data

MaintenanceUpdateDto.description: A status update within a scheduled maintenance lifecycle

ScheduledMaintenanceDto.description: A scheduled maintenance window from a vendor status page

overallUptimePct.description: Overall uptime percentage across the entire period; null when no polling data exists

buckets.description: Per-bucket breakdown ordered by time ascending

source.description: Data source: vendor_reported, incident_derived, or poll_derived

ServiceUptimeResponse.description: Uptime response with per-bucket breakdown and overall percentage for the period

uptimePct.description: Uptime percentage for this bucket; null when no polls occurred

totalPolls.description: Total number of polls recorded in this bucket

UptimeBucketDto.description: Uptime statistics for a single time bucket

eventsJson.description: Incident event references for this day as raw JSON

ComponentUptimeDayDto.description: Daily uptime data for a component

uptimePercentage.description: Uptime percentage over the requested window; null when no data

avgLatencyMs.description: Weighted average latency in milliseconds; null when no data

p95LatencyMs.description: 95th-percentile latency in milliseconds (upper bound across regions); null when no data

UptimeDto.description: Uptime statistics aggregated from continuous aggregates

items.description: Items on this page

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when there are no more results

hasMore.description: Whether more results exist beyond this page

CursorPage.description: Cursor-paginated response for time-series and append-only data

AssertionResultDto.description: Result of evaluating a single assertion against a check result

statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the response

items.description: HTTP response headers

responseBodySnapshot.description: Raw response body snapshot (may be HTML, XML, JSON, or plain text)

CheckResultDetailsDto.description: Type-specific details captured during a check execution

id.description: Unique identifier of the check result

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the check was executed (ISO 8601)

region.description: Region where the check was executed

severityHint.description: Severity hint: 'down' for hard failures, 'degraded' for warn-only failures, null when passing

CheckResultDto.description: A single check result from a monitor run

CheckTypeDetailsDto.description: Check-type-specific details — polymorphic by check_type discriminator

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when there are no more results

hasMore.description: Whether more results exist beyond this page

CursorPageCheckResultDto.description: Cursor-paginated response for time-series and append-only data

items.description: Requested DNS record types

additionalProperties.description: Resolved DNS records keyed by record type
Resolved DNS records keyed by record type

items.description: Resolved DNS records keyed by record type

records.description: Resolved DNS records keyed by record type

items.description: DNS resolution attempts

failureKind.description: Kind of DNS failure, if any

bodyTruncated.description: Whether the response body was truncated before storage

connected.description: Whether a TCP connection was established

items.description: Subject Alternative Names

chainValid.description: Whether the chain validated against the OS trust store

TlsInfoDto.description: TLS/SSL certificate details for HTTPS targets

uptimePercent.description: Uptime percentage for this bucket; null when no data

avgLatencyMs.description: Weighted average latency in milliseconds for this bucket

p95LatencyMs.description: 95th percentile latency in milliseconds (max across regions)

p99LatencyMs.description: 99th percentile latency in milliseconds (max across regions)

ChartBucketDto.description: Aggregated metrics for a time bucket

passed.description: Whether the last check in this region passed

responseTimeMs.description: Response time in milliseconds for the last check

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the last check in this region (ISO 8601)

severityHint.description: Severity hint: 'down' for hard failures, 'degraded' for warn-only failures, null when passing

RegionStatusDto.description: Latest check result for a single region

currentStatus.description: Derived current status across all regions

chartData.description: Time-bucketed chart data for the requested window

uptime24h.description: Uptime percentage over the last 24 hours; null when no data

uptimeWindow.description: Uptime percentage for the selected chart window; null when no data

ResultSummaryDto.description: Dashboard summary: current status, per-region latest results, and chart data

AuthMeResponse.description: Identity, organization, plan, and rate-limit info for the authenticated API key

lastUsedAt.description: Last time the key was used

trialActive.description: Whether the org is on a trial

entitlements.description: Entitlement limits keyed by entitlement name

additionalProperties.description: Current usage counters keyed by entitlement name

usage.description: Current usage counters keyed by entitlement name

remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window

RateLimitInfo.description: Rate-limit quota for the current sliding window

responseStatusCode.description: HTTP response status code from the external service

requestPayload.description: JSON payload sent to the external service

responseBody.description: Response body from the external service (truncated)

errorMessage.description: Error message if the attempt failed

externalId.description: External identifier (e.g. PagerDuty dedup_key, SES MessageId, webhook delivery UUID)

additionalProperties.description: HTTP request headers sent to the external service

requestHeaders.description: HTTP request headers sent to the external service

DeliveryAttemptDto.description: Single delivery attempt with request/response audit data

tagIds.description: IDs of the tags to detach from the monitor

items.description: IDs of the tags to detach from the monitor

RemoveMonitorTagsRequest.description: Request body for removing tags from a monitor

affectedPolicies.description: Number of notification policies whose escalation steps were modified

disabledPolicies.description: Number of notification policies disabled because they had no remaining channels

DeleteChannelResult.description: Summary of policies affected by channel deletion

BearerAuth.description: API key (dh_live_...) or Auth0 JWT token
